_strategy: Round 1 on TrainTicket: 41 services, 31297 candidates. Loadgen at OperationsPAI/loadgenerator@d1e5f07. K=12 candidates with 30% pair probability per submit_dual.py — expect ~3 pairs / ~6 singles → ~9 traces. Single fault round to validate TT infra; from R2 add anti-detector / valuation.
_results: 10 traces in flight (after retry of tt03/tt05 due to redis txn race). 5/12 candidates +1 (4 traces): tt06+tt07 PAIRED user/PodFailure×station/PodFailure ts5 (both inherit), tt08 route/PodFailure ts6, tt11 contacts/PodFailure ts9, tt04 payment/PodKill ts13. 4/12 -1: tt09 cancel/PodFailure ts7, tt12 food/PodFailure ts10, tt03 travel/PodKill ts15, tt05 basic/PodKill ts16. 3/12 env-fail: tt10 assurance/PodFailure ts8 RestartPedestal failed (pedestal restart timeout — TT 41-svc cold start >5min), tt01+tt02 PAIRED auth/PodKill×order/PodKill ts11 BuildDatapack failed (datapack-build OOM or stale collector for paired chaos? need investigation). Signal: PodFailure 5s on TT business services lights detector reliably (5/8 traces with reward != -1 are PodFailure); TT detector more sensitive than sockshop's. Next: JVM exceptions on hot Java methods + multi-step business chaos.

_known_issues.ts8_restart_failed: RestartPedestal Error on ts8: TT pedestal cold-start has 41 deployments to wait on; Helm post-install timeout may be too short for fresh ns. Investigate operator restart-pedestal timeout (default 300s) vs TT readiness time (~5-7min cold).
_known_issues.ts11_pair_datapack_failed: tt01+tt02 paired auth+order PodKill: BuildDatapack errored. Likely (1) parquet writer hit error on simultaneous chaos windows confusing query-range, or (2) cluster pressure. Check datapack-builder logs for ts11.
_known_issues.redis_txn_race: Initial submit of tt03/tt05 returned 500 'redis transaction failed' (PR #192 lua compare-and-del race when bursting submits). Retry with 5s delay succeeds. Workaround: submit_dual.py adds time.sleep(2) but bursts of 12 hit window; consider increasing inter-submit sleep to 5s for K>10.
